corrections.current: Β πρὸς τῇ νύμφῃ αὐτοῦ, χαίρων καὶ εὐλογῶν τὸν θεόν, πρὸς τῇ
corrections.correct: Β πρὸς τὴν νύμφην αὐτοῦ, χαίρων καὶ εὐλογῶν τὸν θεόν, πρὸς τὴν
corrections.note: Image clearly reads accusative τὴν νύμφην ... πρὸς τὴν πύλην.

corrections.current:
ὅτι ἠλέη-
σεν αὐτοὺς ὁ θεός.
corrections.correct:
ὅτι ἠλέη-
σεν αὐτὸν ὁ θεός.

corrections.note: Printed form is accusative νύμφην split by line context: Σάρρᾳ τῇ νύμφῃν αὐτοῦ.
Name clearly printed with alpha after chi: Ἀχιάχαρος.
Printed form appears ἀγήοχεν, matching apparatus note.
Transcript has broken/misread name; print reads Ἀχειχάρος.
Apparatus clearly reads Αχιαχαρος for corrected hand.

corrections.current: οι εξαδελφοι ℵ*] ο εξάδελφος ℵc.a
corrections.correct: οι εξάδελφοι ℵ*] ο ἐξάδελφος ℵc.a

corrections.note: Corrector siglum is c with superscript/qualifier, not numeral 1.

uncertain.note: The printed phrase after Σάρρᾳ looks like τῇ νύμφῃ αὐτοῦ; accusative ending may be visually ambiguous because of type and spacing.
Final siglum after B appears as Bᵃ? b / Ba?b; exact superscript formatting is hard to resolve from scan.

notes: Running head matches. Main body has several real errors, especially case endings and proper names. Apparatus mostly correct but includes one name-form error and one siglum formatting issue. Page number 840 correctly present and not transcribed as body text.
